Group.title: Group
Group.description: Represents a split bill group owned by a leader and shared with members

name.description: Name of the bill splitting group

ownerId.description: The firebase UID of the Gmail user who created and manages the group

members.description: List of members inside the group, each with their access codes

expenses.description: List of expense bills inside the group

pendingReceipts.description: List of payment proofs submitted by members

/groups/{groupId}.description: Stores all details about a specific bill splitting group
